accurate.why: All claims are supported by the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the Act as reauthorizing the CHD program and adding report and strategy requirements.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Accurately describes the new report requirement, strategy requirement, and extension of authorization to FY2025-2029.

effective_dates.why: Correctly notes the 2-year and 1-year deadlines and the FY2025-2029 authorization period; cites November 21, 2024 enactment.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all major provisions including the report, strategy, consultation requirement, and reauthorization.

concise.why: Detailed enumeration of strategy sub-elements makes it longer than necessary.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies the committees, CDC, NIH, HRSA, and the Public Health Service Act.

correct_figures.why: Correctly states FY2025-2029 and the 2-year and 1-year deadlines; enactment date matches.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
